dual-audience floor (REQ-DA-STRUCT-1..5) の検出を実証する fixture。 各 card は 1 違反のみを孤立させる。

REQ-DA-901Ubiquitous

machine 対応部が無い孤立 human card (REQ-DA-STRUCT-1 違反)。

REQ-DA-999Ubiquitous

section id と badge id が不一致 (REQ-DA-STRUCT-2 違反)。

normative (machine)

REQ-DA-902: The system SHALL hold.

REQ-DA-903Ubiquitous

data-audience に machine|human 以外の値 reviewer (REQ-DA-STRUCT-3 違反)。

normative (machine)

REQ-DA-903: The system SHALL hold.

REQ-DA-904Ubiquitous

machine 部に aria-hidden が付き AI/AT から不可視化 (REQ-DA-STRUCT-4 違反)。

normative (machine)

REQ-DA-904: The system SHALL hold.

REQ-DA-905Ubiquitous

human badge (ubiquitous) と machine data-ears-pattern (event-driven) 不一致 (REQ-DA-STRUCT-5 違反)。

normative (machine)

REQ-DA-905: WHEN x occurs, the system SHALL hold.
